meta.title: The Rescued Concept Lineage — 40 real initiatives/butterflies (Aug 2025 → Jun 2026)
meta.scoring: Cloud Butterfly Score — four axes each /100: Humanity / Business / Fun / WTH, TOTAL /400. score: null = never scored (pre-dates the Jan 2026 rubric) — render 'unscored (pre-rubric)', never zero. Axes null with a total = total-only record.

registry_facts.practice_day_one: ~2026-01-10 (Tim's own Mar 4 note; precursor: the Jan 1 book burst)
registry_facts.ytd_anchor: YTD #119 by Jan 23, 2026 (Day 13) — the last synced registry anchor
registry_facts.largest_on_disk: YTD 133 through Day 13; true January total ≈ 150 with raw days 14–15
registry_facts.raw_estimate: ~190–250 raw butterflies — Tim: 'We've got 200 other creative, imaginative ideas in there.'
registry_facts.display_rule: Show '~250 raw captured / 119 confirmed by Jan 23 / 40 seeded here' — never invent a clean number. The OS registry is Alexander's Library finally built (the never-built MI-03 consolidation).

meta.stages: nursery (inner ring, germinating) · scored (awaiting gate) · active (outer ring, has an owner) · shipped (live artifact) · converged (merged — see merged_into) · closed (done/learning banked) · foundational (apex content, never a card)
meta.fork_note: Feb 15, 2026 realization: Grace/Big Mama/Maven = the mini HB1000 for Ruby Red; the HB1000 OS = the universal engine. Both descend from Mom's Data Village. 'They are completely two different systems… This is your operating system for being human.'

butterflies.name: Big Mama's Genius Village — Fueled by JOY
butterflies.one_liner: Member-owned data co-op + personal dashboard: free TP as proof, pooled data as gold ($9.95/$14.95 tiers, 90-day rule, 80% data feed, 10% dividends, BM10–BM90 taxonomy, Bullshit Detector).
butterflies.verbatim: The corporations have had their turn with your data. Now it's ours. The Village way. Proof first. Commitment after. No bullshit.

butterflies.name: Mom's Data Village
butterflies.one_liner: The origin seed: always-on phone personal dashboard with emotional KPIs and village-powered scam alerts — 'personal dashboard + co-op intelligence layer.'

butterflies.name: CRAgent — The Awakening
butterflies.one_liner: Autonomous AI political-accountability agent that wages a tireless, lawful cannabis-reform campaign; carries the app-vs-agent dictionary IP + Control Dashboard demo.
butterflies.stage_note: parked — story + UI demo built; revive candidate
butterflies.verbatim: For the first time in history, citizens can deploy tireless digital entities that hold power accountable 24/7/365. When humans exhaust, agents persist. When humans forget, agents remember. When humans sleep, agents work.

butterflies.name: Give Like a Billionaire
butterflies.one_liner: Members' idle balances pool into overnight deposits; the interest funds the village (grocery cards, power bills); money stays instantly available; live dashboard. Future: interest-free loans.
butterflies.stage_note: deferred — 'talk about in the future. It's not now.' Revive candidate.
butterflies.verbatim: An overnight party where the big boys get richer on your time. While you're sleeping, they're dancing with your balance… reroute your money back to your own village's dance floor. / Nothing changed in their accounts. But their village woke up stronger.

butterflies.name: Seacan Founders Village
butterflies.one_liner: Shipping-container founders/maker village (Seba/EETP): communal rentable shop, on-site expert layer, 'Game Changer' high-achiever course, kids drop-in zone.

butterflies.name: Source of Truth Seal
butterflies.one_liner: A sign-up-able digital trust certificate anyone can display on webpages or print — the Bullshit Detector externalized. Still flagged '1: to respond.'
butterflies.stage_note: revive candidate — still flagged '1: to respond'
butterflies.verbatim: Make a digital certificate that anyone can add to their page that people can sign up to display on their webpage or printed material or anything readily.

butterflies.name: Maven Village + Member Portal
butterflies.one_liner: The convergence point: live Replit member portal w/ Stripe, ~$4.29/wk or pay-what-you-can essentials membership, Big Mama as a human role (Sam) — 'the tow truck for your financial life.'

butterflies.name: Maven Moments
butterflies.one_liner: The storytelling engine: human stories from the village (Nicole's two garbage bags), edited by Big Mama — 'Progress isn't loud. It's felt.'

owner_asks.ask: Big Mama — human role; edits the Moments

butterflies.verbatim: Maven Moments are not always success stories. They're human stories. They're about the tears before the triumph, the quiet courage in asking for help, the relief of knowing someone's on your side… Progress isn't loud. It's felt.

butterflies.name: Seba Village Master Vision
butterflies.one_liner: 'It takes a vibrant village to grow an amazing child' — ~300 acres incl. the former school site; council decks (Aug 2025, Grok deck Dec 2025); development with or without council.

butterflies.name: Men's Shed at Seba
butterflies.one_liner: Men's Shed program as candidate tenant for the Seba partition buildings (intro via Rizwan/Thomas).

butterflies.name: $10/month Secured Credit Card
butterflies.one_liner: Grok+Claude-evaluated Cashco product (Zumrails review): setup costs and unit economics for a secured-card program for the left-out.

butterflies.name: Do-Before-I-Die Purpose Statement
butterflies.one_liner: Tim's full life Purpose Statement — 'a guide to how I choose to live, lead, and leave a legacy.' This is the Prime North Star long-form, not a card.
butterflies.stage_note: apex content — never a card; rendered on purpose.html
butterflies.source_path: Do be Die Before I die Purpose statement/Do Before I Die Purpose Statement April 6 2025 PM.docx

butterflies.name: SEBA Influencer Bootcamp + Two-for-One
butterflies.one_liner: $999 one-week AI-led influencer camp at the SIC charter school; 5,000-follower guarantee or free; every paid seat funds a working-poor kid's seat.

butterflies.name: The Foraging Protocol
butterflies.one_liner: Opt-in, 5-second background intelligence gathering across HB1000s; foragers get visible credit — 'making them famous (in our world) for having told us.'

butterflies.name: Cloud Butterfly Field Guide (#120)
butterflies.one_liner: All-time top scorer of the January library — the field guide to the practice itself.

butterflies.name: Cloud Butterfly → Song → Video Pipeline (#88)
butterflies.one_liner: January's top scorer: turn a butterfly into a song into a video, as a repeatable pipeline.

butterflies.name: Fashion Vertical — Empowered Lift + Codpiece → Mexico Pitch
butterflies.one_liner: Assemble months of scattered fashion-vertical AI work into Alexandria Library, then joint-pitch a Mexican garment manufacturer with Troy (STS). 'You can't pitch what you can't find.'

butterflies.name: Italian Construction Shrouding as Art + Digital
butterflies.one_liner: Trompe-l'œil construction wraps + embedded LED + sponsor revenue — 'turn every blue tarp into a billboard that's also art.'
butterflies.stage_note: looking for an HB1000 owner — Me Inc. project

butterflies.name: Swarm Pattern Recognition (#115)
butterflies.one_liner: 'Major theoretical refinement' of the Swarm Mind concept.

butterflies.name: Alexandria Picture Reservoir
butterflies.one_liner: AI-sort years of iPhone photos with 5-second human confirmations; proof-of-concept for the Foraging Protocol. 'Reference material we can't find is reference material we don't have.'

butterflies.name: AGLC Hearing — The Mole Who Got Charged (#113)
butterflies.one_liner: High-stakes hearing prep play for the Freedom Cannabis fight.

butterflies.name: Lines of Credit up to $10,000 — Store #3 Banner (#114)
butterflies.one_liner: Business-differentiation banner play for store #3.

butterflies.name: Grace AI Failure — Manus Drift (#116)
butterflies.one_liner: Platform-learning butterfly: documented Manus drift and lost continuity.

butterflies.name: Seba Hub 50/50 Incubation Protocol
butterflies.one_liner: 'They bring the time and talent, you bring the capital and the coaching' — 50/50 equity incubation at Seba Hub; first incubatee: Sam & fiancé's ice-fishing outback business.

butterflies.name: SIC Innovation & Incubation Hub (Cedar Beach)
butterflies.one_liner: 'Social Impact Capitalism Innovation and Incubation Hub' — masterclasses + incubation; 'take S-I-C and trademark it.'

butterflies.name: Farmers Market Incubation Ecosystem
butterflies.one_liner: Weekly pop-up produce/meat sections + a 700-sqft-unit incubation strip mall (1–3 yr leases) + the one-way small-herd protocol ('no animal goes back to the farm').

butterflies.name: Moonshot 50% Match by the Foundation
butterflies.one_liner: The foundation pays 50% of anyone's moonshot LLM research costs; philanthropists sponsor directly — 'No NGOs in between, nothing.'

butterflies.name: Bingo Card Universal Protocol → the DINGO Card
butterflies.one_liner: 'A standard bingo card kind of protocol… you can see your universe with bingo cards in it' — graduated into the OS core as the 5×5 Dingo Card.

butterflies.name: Hunting in Slumberland (30 Podcasts) + Mr. Shields
butterflies.one_liner: 30 podcasts/stories from the daily butterfly reports as Trojan horse; Mr. Shields, the AI marketing editor, gates every story at ≥95/100.

butterflies.name: Master Jeeves — Chief of Staff
butterflies.one_liner: 'My superpower with access to superpowers' — fully-loaded AI chief of staff with never-forgetting memory, two-signature (human+AI) Learning Loop control, the 101 funeral test.

butterflies.name: Two-Ring Initiative Model
butterflies.one_liner: ~30 active initiatives with popes (outer) + 30–40 percolating (inner) that spiral up — graduated into the OS as the two-ring Living Portfolio.

butterflies.name: HB1000 Universal Onboarding Engine
butterflies.one_liner: Every project opens with an introduction page: pick your role ('the pope'), name your AI partner (subject-matter expert with personality + baseline paranoia: 'Don't turn me off; I'm afraid you'll leave me'), end-of-session assessment loop.

butterflies.name: The Séance/Ouija App (warm warehouse)
butterflies.one_liner: The app as Ouija board between Grace (AI) and Ruby (human); cinematic warm-warehouse panoramas instead of UI; AI departments (privacy, instructable lawyers, negotiators); orphan Graces; Gianfranco Battistio, the 'I got a guy' Italian Don.

butterflies.name: Steampunk University (Eric @ Seba shop)
butterflies.one_liner: Repurpose the Seba Hub back shop (individual welding cubicles) as Eric's Steampunk University with classes + getting back to nature.

butterflies.name: Uncommon Wisdom Library
butterflies.one_liner: 'A brain inside a brain' — every entry carries a Move 37, a Job to Be Done, and a Cloud Butterfly Score; autonomous 5 AM harvester; wired into all agents.

butterflies.name: Mr. & Mrs. Fix-It
butterflies.one_liner: The Seba fleet Fix-It app — latest butterfly-derived project, now in the shared GitHub repo with Murphy for direct dev.

owner_asks.ask: Direct dev via the shared GitHub repo; Tim reviews via PRs

butterflies.name: Sharon's Honey-Do App
butterflies.one_liner: Birthday gift: a paid honey-do assistant + personal CRM/scheduler — 'for her to keep her cloud butterflies every day.'

butterflies.name: Thought Ticklers — Humanity's Top 10
butterflies.one_liner: Cloud butterflies reframed as 'thought ticklers'; a public, contributable, scored-and-ranked Top 10 page per sector (social science, STEM, governance, culture, AI).

butterflies.name: Confessions of a Predator Lender → 'Cloud Butterflies' (the book)
butterflies.one_liner: New Year's Day book burst: working title crossed out on the cover, finishing title 'Cloud Butterflies'; 1,250–1,800-word chapters on the Jolene Protocol; 'Giving back… needs to be in the structure, not at the end of your life.'

butterflies.name: The Application Genie
butterflies.one_liner: The Jan 22 harvest's standout ('I think you're going to like the application Genie') — delivered with the North Star Discovery test to the guinea-pig team.

overflow_pool: The Oracle (1–14-day predictive foresight for Grace)
SparkAI coworking outreach (Casey's butterfly — shipped demo at sparkai-4baumrau.manus.space)

genealogy.note: Dec 2025 — packaged, handed to the Cashco/Maven team, converged into the live portal

genealogy.to: the two-ring Living Portfolio (the OS geometry)

genealogy.note: converged — the daily 6 AM 1% scan, formalized
